title: Formatting, Style, and Editor Consistency · Gate Lens: Format Migration
summary: Create one fast deterministic formatting path for code and configuration. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates format migration increment in a zero-diff formatting gate. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Introduce or replace formatting with isolated reviewable migration commits.
Exclude generated, vendored, fixture, and snapshot files intentionally.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
